arts.ttl: Liverpool turn down massive £70m offer for 25-year-old – report
arts.sum: Liverpool have reportedly turned down a substantial £70 million offer from Saudi Pro League giants Al-Hilal for Uruguayan striker Darwin Nunez. Speculation about the forward’s future has been rife in recent days, with the Saudi side emerging as serious contenders for his signature.
